hibernate-mapping.query: select sst from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domainsecondary.SourceSystemTransmission sst where sst.CompanyId = :company and sst.CreatedDate = ( select max(max_sst.CreatedDate) from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domainsecondary.SourceSystemTransmission max_sst where max_sst.CompanyId = :company and max_sst.CreatedDate >= :lowerDateBound)

select sst.CreatedDate from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domainsecondary.SourceSystemTransmission as sst where sst.CompanyId = :company and sst.CreatedDate = ( select max(max_sst.CreatedDate) from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domainsecondary.SourceSystemTransmission as max_sst where max_sst.CompanyId = :company and max_sst.CreatedDate >= :lowerDateBound)

select sst.ResponseToken from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domainsecondary.SourceSystemTransmission as sst where sst.CompanyId = :company and sst.CreatedDate = ( select max(max_sst.CreatedDate) from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domainsecondary.SourceSystemTransmission as max_sst where max_sst.CompanyId = :company and max_sst.CreatedDate >= :lowerDateBound)

select ssTransmission from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domainsecondary.SourceSystemTransmission as ssTransmission where ssTransmission.TransmissionIdentifier in (:companyEventDetailsValue) and ssTransmission.CreatedDate >=:fromDate and ssTransmission.CreatedDate <=:toDate and ssTransmission.CompanyId = :companyId order by ssTransmission.CreatedDate
